kaøw 17.01.2026 20:01
Illegal instructions only occurred on… a invalid instruction I believe. Multiple EXE games just tend to slap in the Illegal instruction screen with no prior reason for it, and plus it’s a game made in clickteam.

Anakama 4.03.2026 13:59
At the very least, you need to program stuff creatively. This is the source code from my old Scratch edition, and I barely followed any tutorials. The most important thing in game development is the ability to take what you learn from tutorials, come up with your own ideas, and experiment. Without that, you’ll just end up making meaningless games that only follow tutorials forever.
14:00
